_comment: Copy to ~/.config/news-brief/settings.json and edit. Controls delivery + recipient. Onboarding can write this for you.
_delivery_options: lark | email | file  (start with 'file' to test locally, then switch)
_lark_hint: Get yours with: lark-cli contact   (or ask your Lark admin). Needs a bot with scope im:message.send_as_bot.
_email_hint: SMTP credentials live in ~/.config/news-brief/.env, not here. See TUTORIAL.md.
